channel.title: Ovi ren — blog
channel.description: Writing by Ovi ren — hobby programmer.

item.title: Commit Like a Pro
item.description: Stop writing bad commit messages. A complete conventional commits guide — the standard used by Angular, Vue, Electron, and thousands of open source projects.

item.title: My First Website
item.description: The beginning of my web development journey. Created on my birthday, August 23, 2021 — a simple website that represents where it all started.
